serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-27. activate_project --project ~1.3s warm. find_symbol broad 70s+ (prefer Grep). Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'. Dynamic Workflow tool needs manual review — do audits directly via Grep/Read.

open_issues.sg27a1_R27: tolowerequalfold (NEW 21st linter, registered cmd/linters/main.go:38 import/63 register; pkg/linters/tolowerequalfold/tolowerequalfold.go). Flags ==/!= BinaryExpr where EITHER operand is strings.ToLower/ToUpper(...) call -> recommend strings.EqualFold. UNENFORCED, NO //nolint support. PRECISION GAP: reports lowerLeft||lowerRight ignoring opposite operand -> FALSE-POSITIVES self-comparison case-detection idiom strings.ToLower(x)==x / !=x ('is x already lowercase?'), which must NOT become EqualFold (EqualFold(x,x) always true). 3 prod FP sites: tools_validation_github.go:191 (ToLower(pattern)!=pattern lowercase-guard — applying fix INVERTS guard, DANGEROUS), logs_report_tools.go:56 (hasCapital), codemod_discussion_trigger_categories.go:68. testdata okExamples(17-26) does NOT cover self-compare. Fix: caseConvArg(extract inner arg of ToLower/ToUpper call)+sameOperand(ObjectOf ident compare) -> skip when other operand == inner arg. Single-file precision improvement (sg24a1/sg26a1 pattern). ~15 GENUINE TP sites remain after fix (yaml_import:39, schema_suggestions:666, repo_memory_validation:52, features:69/105, resolve:173/189/227, notify_comment:630, strings:224, codespace:17, forecast:462, add_workflow_resolution:459, outcome_eval_review:79, import_url_fetcher:218) -> NOT near-zero, enforce is separate follow-up. Issue filed sg27a1.

Ask = add escape filter (drop candidate if returned/passed/stored/captured) then re-measure residual local-only sites THEN enforce.

patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 POSITIVE LINTER_FLAGS. R27=11 flags: -errstringmatch -panicinlibrarycode -manualmutexunlock -osexitinlibrary -rawloginlib -regexpcompileinfunction -fprintlnsprintf -strconvparseignorederror -jsonmarshalignoredeerror -uncheckedtypeassertion -fmterrorfnoverbs. Append for zero-vio; refactor///nolint first for non-zero.
patterns.enforce_landed_5consec_then_STALL: PROVEN R22->R26 (5 consec): audit registered-but-unenforced NEAR-ZERO linter -> fix-to-zero -> file enforce = lands within week. R27 STALLED: seenmapbool (60+ sites, non-near-zero) did NOT land — fast pattern requires near-zero. For non-near-zero NEW linters, pivot to PRECISION-FIX angle (single-file, self-consistency) which is independently landable (sg27a1 tolowerequalfold self-compare FP).
patterns.linter_precision_subpattern: NEW linters often ship with precision gaps. sg24a1(two-value ResultOf self-consistency RESOLVED R25), sg26a1(seenmapbool escape-blind, OPEN), sg27a1(tolowerequalfold self-compare FP, OPEN). Single-file linter fix = high landability, decoupled from N-site enforce refactor. Check each NEW linter's testdata okExamples for uncovered FP idioms.
patterns.wasm_build_tag: *_wasm.go files carry IMPLICIT GOARCH=wasm via filename (no //go:build needed). Host (linux) golint-custom EXCLUDES them. Partition grep hits by build constraint before claiming 'N enforceable'.
patterns.self_consistency: Linter framework's own analyzers should pass enforced linters. sg24a1 RESOLVED R25.

bash_policy: Sandbox blocks: multi-stmt compounds, mkdir/ls/find-exec/wc/cat/sed outside repo, for-loops, backtick grep (cmd subst), heredoc, git on /tmp. go build blocked (lint via Grep/Read). gh issue/search list --json 'Malformed version:'; gh api search/issues label query null items — open-issue check unreliable, rely on memory+7d expiry. Glob/Read/Write work on /tmp; bash CANNOT write/read /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory (use Write/Edit; append via Edit on unique tail). /tmp/gh-aw/agent/ bash-writable. safeoutputs `. < file.json`. KEEP MEMORY FILES SMALL — 10KB patch limit; prefer Edit over full Write rewrites.
